chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-523 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For order on M.A No.3024/2019 3. For hearing of M.A No.19757/2016 4. For hearing of main case 05.11.2025 Mr.Manzoor Ahmed Lund, Advocate for respondent No.1 ******** None is present on behalf of the petitioners. No intimation is received. The same was the case on the last date of hearing. Intimation notice to the learned counsel for the petitioners has already been effected pursuant to the Order dated 14.10.2025. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in the matter. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
